archetype: 7 (Electric & Neon) combined with 5 (Luxury) for a Premium Arcade feel

layout_and_spacing.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto h-[100dvh] overflow-hidden relative shadow-2xl bg-[#09090B] sm:rounded-3xl sm:h-[90vh] sm:my-[5vh]
layout_and_spacing.button: h-14 px-8 rounded-full font-bold text-lg w-full flex items-center justify-center transition-all
layout_and_spacing.map_nodes: w-16 h-16 rounded-full border-4 border-[#18181B] shadow-xl flex items-center justify-center text-xl font-bold z-10 relative

surfaces_and_effects.modal_overlay: backdrop-blur-md bg-black/60 z-50 fixed inset-0 flex items-center justify-center

components_strategy.buttons: Custom Framer Motion buttons (whileTap scale 0.95). Primary buttons use world-specific gradient.
components_strategy.level_map: Vertical scrolling container. SVG dashed line connecting absolute-positioned level nodes. Nodes alternate left/right to create a winding path.
components_strategy.world_selector: Horizontal swiper/carousel (Framer Motion) showing large cards with world background images.
components_strategy.game_board: CSS Grid based on the game type. Match-3 (8x8 grid), Memory (4x5 grid), Slide (4x4 grid), Word Search (10x10 grid).
components_strategy.auth: Shadcn UI forms customized heavily with glassmorphism and large tap targets. Social login buttons.
components_strategy.icons: lucide-react for system icons (settings, back, profile). Custom SVGs or emojis for game pieces.

motion_and_animations.page_transition: Framer Motion layout animations. Slide in from right.
motion_and_animations.level_unlock: Particle burst (using framer-motion or canvas) + scale pop.
motion_and_animations.game_interactions: Spring animations for tile swaps, card flips (rotateY), and tile slides.
motion_and_animations.stars: Staggered pop-in with slight overshoot (spring, bounce: 0.5).

game_icon.description: App icon/logo - USA map with puzzle pieces

miami.description: Miami world background - Ocean sunset, neon pink/cyan

vegas.description: Vegas world background - Night skyline, gold/charcoal

la.description: LA world background - Sunset orange, palm silhouettes

california.description: California world background - Golden beach, surf, mint

new_york.description: New York world background - Urban street, cobalt/yellow

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first responsive PWA. Use a max-w-md container centered on desktop to emulate a mobile device.
Implement navigation using a bottom tab bar or top header depending on the screen (e.g., Map, Profile).
Use Framer Motion for all route transitions and micro-interactions (bouncing buttons, level unlocks).
For the level map, create a scrolling vertical container with an SVG winding path connecting 20 nodes. Color the nodes and path based on the current world's primary color.
Integrate the provided generated background images for the world selection cards and as a blurred/darkened background for the level map.
For the game screens, build 4 distinct grid-based boards (Match-3, Memory, Slide, Word Search). Use pure HTML/Tailwind and React state for the logic, don't overcomplicate with Shadcn cards here.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='level-node-1', data-testid='login-button').
Do NOT use placeholder text or images. Rely entirely on the provided media URLs.
